name: DLT Resolution Inc.
business: DLT Resolution Inc. operates in blockchain applications and telecommunications in Canada and the United States. It provides a Health Information Exchange (RecordsBank.org) for secure medical record retrieval and a Hosted PBX cloud-based telecom solution for businesses.

exposures.sentence: The Resolution Telecom business has been providing a wide range of innovative solutions that are reliable, scalable and flexible to hundreds of Canadian businesses for more than two decades.

The Company operates a Health Information Exchange providing the ability to request and retrieve medical information and records while meeting all of today s security & compliance demands for HIPAA, PIPEDA and PHIPA.
DLT Resolution Inc. operates in blockchain applications and telecommunications in Canada and the United States.
